title: Forms for special and diplomatic passports - Canada.ca
content:
## Forms for special and diplomatic passports
This section contains information for representatives of the Government of Canada and people travelling on Government of Canada business.
Tips for using forms for special and diplomatic passports:
- Print on white, 8 ½ x 11 inch (216 x 279 mm) bond-quality, non-glossy paper.
- Type your information directly into the form first and then print it. This helps to reduce spelling errors.

### Apply for the first time
Adult special or diplomatic passport application form (PPTC 636) (PDF, 2.47 MB)

### Renew your official passport (if you already have a special or diplomatic passport, or if you have a valid regular (blue) Canadian passport)
Adult simplified renewal special or diplomatic passport application form (PPTC 638) (PDF, 2.65 MB)

### Apply for a child under 16 years of age
Child special or diplomatic passport application form (PPTC 637E) (PDF, 2.4 MB)
Visa facilitation form (PPTC 639) (PDF, 2.6 MB)
- Passport information billing Form [PPTC 467] (PDF, 2.21 MB)

## For clients from the Department of National Defence and the Canadian Armed Forces
- Requisition Form for Official Passports [PPTC 455] (PDF, 92 KB)
- Department of National Defence Posting Confirmation [PPTC 458] (PDF, 1.27 MB)

## For clients from Global Affairs Canada
- Agreement Regarding Continued Custody of Diplomatic Passports [PPTC 446] (PDF, 1.28 MB)
